items.name: open-design-landing-html
items.title: Open Design Landing
items.author: Open Design
items.description: Single-file editorial landing page. All CSS inlined. Drop one file, get a full page with warm paper aesthetic, coral accents, and editorial typography.

items.name: open-design-landing-split
items.title: Open Design Landing (Split)
items.author: Open Design
items.description: Editorial landing page with separated HTML and CSS files. Clean markup with external stylesheet for easy customization.

items.name: open-design-landing-react
items.title: Open Design Landing (React)
items.author: Open Design
items.description: React component version of the Open Design landing page. Use in Next.js or any React project with the Atelier Zero design system.

items.name: modern-saas-landing
items.title: Modern SaaS Landing
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Clean, professional SaaS landing page with hero, features grid, pricing cards, and CTA. Built with Inter font and indigo accent color.

items.name: portfolio-minimal
items.title: Portfolio — Minimal
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Dark, elegant portfolio page with project grid, about section, skills, timeline, and contact links. Space Grotesk typography.

items.name: agency-studio
items.title: Studio — Creative Agency
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Bold, editorial creative agency page with services list, work showcase, client logos, and marquee animation. Playfair Display serif headings.
